title: GSR 764(E) Regarding extension of tenure of Shri Justice S. B, Sakrikar as Commissioner
description: GSR 764(E) Regarding extension of tenure of Shri Justice S. B, Sakrikar as Commissioner
text: REGD. NO.D.L.-33004/98 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II-—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 506] NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, DECEMBER 24, 1998/PAUSA 3,1920 MINISTRY OF CHEMICALS & FERTILIZERS (Department of Chemicals & Petrochemicals) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, thc 18th December. 1998 G. S. R. 764 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section ( I ) of Section 6 of the Bhopal Gas Leak Disaster (Processing o r Claims) Act. 1985 (21 of 1()85). thc Central Govcrnment herebv appoints Justice Shri S. B Sakrikar,, sitting Judge of the High Court of Madhya Pradesh to hold concurrent charge of the post of Commissioner for thc Welfare of the Victims of Bhopal G a s Leak Disaster, for a further period of one year with effect on and from the 15th September, 1998. (afternoon) Thus is in continuation of this Department's notification No G .S. R 652(E) dated the 12th November. 1997 | No. 21/27/95-B. Cell| S H A N T A N U C O N S U L . Jt.
